lead_headline: Metro restaurant scene hits pause: zero openings or closures logged in seven days, the first flatline week since tracking began.

restaurant.blurb: Zero openings, zero closures in the past seven days — a rare complete standstill after February's flurry. Last week saw six events including Yogurtland Arvada, Riot House downtown, and Reunion Bread in Platt Park. The lull likely reflects typical post-winter recalibration before spring leasing kicks in.

foreclosure.blurb: Zero new filings this week and none yet in March. February's quiet carried forward — no high-value distress, no auction notices. Total tracked portfolio holds at 1,539 properties.

retail.blurb: Retail lease tracking in development. Storefront vacancy and big-box turnover data coming soon.

revenue.blurb: Sales tax revenue by district planned for future rollout. Tracking municipal economic indicators.

reputation.blurb: Health inspection scores and permit violations analysis on the roadmap for later this year.
